scripts.doctor: echo 'apps/telemux doctor is legacy-only; prefer brainctl doctor --config ~/.config/brainstack/brainstack.yaml --workers' >&2; ./scripts/doctor.sh
scripts.bootstrap:codex: echo 'apps/telemux bootstrap:codex is legacy-only; prefer brainctl hooks/skills lifecycle commands' >&2; ./scripts/bootstrap-codex.sh
